confidence.rationale: Cron entries and log timestamps show the scheduler still fires. Rotated logs show 2026-06-23 13:35 completed LINE batch attempts, while later runs fail before delivery or are blocked by the production scheduler gate.

git_timeline_findings.finding: Recent commits after 2026-06-23 include delivery gate and production scheduler gate changes.
git_timeline_findings.impact: The timeline aligns with a behavior change where scheduler execution can be routed through a no-delivery gate.
related_commits: AI-DEV-099 production scheduler delivery gate integration
AI-DEV-100 production scheduler runtime gate wiring
AI-DEV-101 production scheduler gate runtime activation
AI-DEV-102 production scheduler gate runtime smoke test

line_sender_findings.finding: reports.line_report_sender sends to the LINE push endpoint only after reports are batched.
line_sender_findings.impact: Post-2026-06-23 failures observed in logs occur before this call path.

line_sender_findings.finding: LINE recipient and token values are loaded from environment, but secret values were not inspected.
line_sender_findings.impact: Credential presence or validity was not proven by this read-only diagnosis.

likely_root_causes.cause: Pipeline fails before LINE delivery during historical data update.
evidence: 2026-06-24 07:00 log shows Shioaji Kbars date range error before report batching.
2026-06-24 through 2026-06-30 logs repeatedly show Shioaji login maintenance/version errors before report batching.

likely_root_causes.cause: Current scheduler runner default routes through production scheduler gate runtime with delivery_allowed=false unless legacy production approval is explicitly enabled.
evidence: run_stock_analysis.sh only calls the approved production pipeline when the legacy production approval environment flag is enabled.
Default gate fixture uses mode=dry_run_no_delivery, approval_status=pending_approval, and delivery_allowed=false.
logs/daily.log contains gate output with line_push in blocked_actions and no_line_push=true.

likely_root_causes.cause: LINE token or recipient configuration failure.
evidence: No post-window LINE sender exception was observed in logs.
Secrets were intentionally not read, so credential validity remains unconfirmed.

current_log.summary: 2026-06-30 scheduled runs reached pre_open startup but failed at Shioaji login before report generation; the same log also contains production scheduler gate runtime output blocking delivery.

rotated_logs.summary: 2026-06-23 13:35 run completed report generation, three LINE batches, and backtest auto update.
2026-06-24 runs began failing before LINE delivery.
2026-06-25 through 2026-06-29 runs repeatedly failed at Shioaji login before LINE delivery.

next_recommendation: Use AI-DEV-105 to add a no-send readiness check for Shioaji version/date-window health and to separate pipeline_failed_before_delivery from delivery_gate_blocked in scheduler logs before restoring live delivery.

pipeline_findings.finding: scripts/run_pipeline.py requires --production-approved for non-dry-run pre_open execution.

pipeline_findings.impact: main.py is not the live delivery path.

pipeline_findings.finding: pre_open pipeline updates historical CSV before building reports and before LINE delivery.
pipeline_findings.impact: Historical update failures prevent LINE delivery from being attempted.

recommended_next_actions: Do not attempt LINE push while diagnosing.
Add a no-send Shioaji dependency/version and request-window preflight.
Constrain historical Kbars requests to the provider limit before production delivery is re-enabled.
Add scheduler log markers for cron_fired, pipeline_started, pipeline_failed_before_delivery, delivery_gate_blocked, and delivery_attempted.
Require explicit human approval before setting any production delivery approval flag or legacy production approval environment.

runner_findings.finding: run_stock_analysis.sh detects scheduler windows using Asia/Taipei time.
Default runner path calls production_scheduler_gate_runtime.py, not the production pipeline.
Legacy production pipeline path requires an explicit production approval environment flag.

scheduler_findings.cron_firing_evidence: logs show runs at 2026-06-30 07:00, 13:05, and 13:35 and rotated logs show earlier scheduled runs.

user_report.reported_issue: Daily LINE push notifications have not been received since after 2026-06-23 13:35.
